title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Omnicom Advertising Group India Ltd
body: "Application number 5376  Applicant Omnicom International Holdings Inc objected to the name used by Omnicom Advertising Group India Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Omnicom Advertising Group India Ltd is changed to 16134244 Ltd. "
